development_result.summary: RFC-009 Phase 1 implementation is COMPLETE. All verification passes: cargo check, fmt, clippy with warnings-as-errors, dylint, 55 session model unit tests, 10 RFC-009 integration tests, 1133 total integration tests, and cargo xtask verify (12/12 checks).

issue.name: pipeline::idle_timeout::tests::io_monitor_child_processes::first_child_observation_without_current_activity_times_out_immediately
issue.description: Test uses SystemTime::UNIX_EPOCH.elapsed() which returns real Unix timestamps. When timestamp is set to 0 and system time is March 2026 (~1774329351 seconds since epoch), the duration calculation produces 1774329351 seconds in error messages. The module (pipeline/idle_timeout/) was NOT modified in this branch - this is a pre-existing test infrastructure issue with the timestamp mocking approach.
issue.impact: Does not affect RFC-009 functionality or production code

issue.name: Angular TestBed.initTestEnvironment() not called
issue.description: Angular spec files (preferences.service.spec.ts, workspace.service.spec.ts) fail because TestBed.initTestEnvironment() is not called in the test setup. This is a pre-existing test infrastructure issue unrelated to RFC-009.
issue.impact: Does not affect Rust code or RFC-009 session model
